auth_challenges_pending_active_idx.name: auth_challenges_pending_active_idx
auth_challenges_pending_active_idx.where: "auth_challenges"."pending_registration_id" is not null and "auth_challenges"."consumed_at" is null and "auth_challenges"."invalidated_at" is null

auth_challenges_user_active_idx.name: auth_challenges_user_active_idx
auth_challenges_user_active_idx.where: "auth_challenges"."user_id" is not null and "auth_challenges"."consumed_at" is null and "auth_challenges"."invalidated_at" is null

auth_challenges_email_active_idx.name: auth_challenges_email_active_idx
auth_challenges_email_active_idx.where: "auth_challenges"."email" is not null and "auth_challenges"."consumed_at" is null and "auth_challenges"."invalidated_at" is null

auth_challenges_exactly_one_subject.name: auth_challenges_exactly_one_subject
auth_challenges_exactly_one_subject.value:
(
        case when "auth_challenges"."pending_registration_id" is null then 0 else 1 end
        + case when "auth_challenges"."user_id" is null then 0 else 1 end
        + case when "auth_challenges"."email" is null then 0 else 1 end
      ) = 1

payment_operations_expected_refund_valid.name: payment_operations_expected_refund_valid
payment_operations_expected_refund_valid.value: ("payment_operations"."type" = 'CANCEL' and "payment_operations"."expected_refunded_amount_cents" is null) or ("payment_operations"."type" in ('REFUND_FULL', 'REFUND_PARTIAL') and "payment_operations"."expected_refunded_amount_cents" > 0)

payments_pix_artifacts_only.name: payments_pix_artifacts_only
payments_pix_artifacts_only.value: "payments"."method" = 'PIX' or ("payments"."qr_code" is null and "payments"."qr_code_base64" is null and "payments"."ticket_url" is null)

store_drivers_pending_terms_complete.name: store_drivers_pending_terms_complete
store_drivers_pending_terms_complete.value:
(
      "store_drivers"."pending_proposed_at" is null
      and "store_drivers"."pending_daily_rate_cents" is null
      and "store_drivers"."pending_per_delivery_cents" is null
      and "store_drivers"."pending_schedule" is null
    ) or (
      "store_drivers"."pending_proposed_at" is not null
      and "store_drivers"."pending_daily_rate_cents" is not null
      and "store_drivers"."pending_per_delivery_cents" is not null
      and "store_drivers"."pending_schedule" is not null
    )
